ACCEPT: price=60
I accept your offer at 60 ZUP.

<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason>The seller’s offer is 60 ZUP, which is below my maximum value of 100 ZUP. Since this is a favorable price and matches my objective to buy the item, I should accept rather than counteroffer. This also preserves negotiation efficiency and ends the game with a valid deal.</reason>
